text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Omg, Zephyr, the way you talk is straight up lit!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You know, you're always like "windy whoosh,
easty squall"? The wind lingo? You gotta teach
me how you do it!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I'm not sure I can... All I'm doing is stringing
words to a kite during a sudden gale.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yasss! No clue what that means, but I totally vibe
with it!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Well, you might feel that way... but exposing your
heart is like stirring up the midsummer storm.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh, uhhh... So like... it's super cringe if you hit hard? Nah, that's cool! It's fire!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: It's chill to use this? Legit, so fresh! Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yes. But... you don't need my permission.
Just let yourself get carried... where the winds
take you.
